fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 67 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), incorrectly permitting adjacent intervals that touch at a boundary. The logic should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly reject such cases as overlaps.

constraints.intent: Adjacent intervals that touch at a boundary should be considered overlapping, so this check for non-adjacency must fail for them.
If no conflict is detected in an iteration, the new interval must be strictly separate from the current existing slot.
A validated interval must have a start time strictly less than its end time.
